'''ranulu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:kyzylkumite|kyzylkumite]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-n-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kyzylkumite|kyzylkumite]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| ranulu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:rænilith|rænilith]] || [[word:rænilij|rænilij]] || [[word:rænilish|rænilish]] || [[word:rænili|rænili]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:ranunuluth|ranunuluth]] || [[word:ranunuluj|ranunuluj]] || [[word:ranunulush|ranunulush]] || [[word:ranunulu|ranunulu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:ranuluth|ranuluth]] || [[word:ranuluj|ranuluj]] || [[word:ranulush|ranulush]] || [[word:ranulu|ranulu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:ranufluth|ranufluth]] || [[word:ranufluj|ranufluj]] || [[word:ranuflush|ranuflush]] || [[word:ranufluf|ranufluf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ranuluthu|ranuluthu]] || [[word:ranuluju|ranuluju]] || [[word:ranulushu|ranulushu]] || [[word:ranuluku|ranuluku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ranuluth|ranuluth]] || [[word:ranuluj|ranuluj]] || [[word:ranulush|ranulush]] || [[word:ranulu|ranulu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ranuluthul|ranuluthul]] || [[word:ranulujul|ranulujul]] || [[word:ranulushul|ranulushul]] || [[word:ranulukul|ranulukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ranuluthuthu|ranuluthuthu]] || [[word:ranulujuju|ranulujuju]] || [[word:ranulushushu|ranulushushu]] || [[word:ranuluku|ranuluku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ranuluthun|ranuluthun]] || [[word:ranulujun|ranulujun]] || [[word:ranulushun|ranulushun]] || [[word:ranulukun|ranulukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ranuluthuoro|ranuluthuoro]] || [[word:ranulujuoro|ranulujuoro]] || [[word:ranulushuoro|ranulushuoro]] || [[word:ranulukuoro|ranulukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|16f482d}}
